headlines.title: Trump says he won't 'rush into' deal to end war with Iran
headlines.description: President Trump said Sunday that he will not “rush into a deal” to end the ongoing U.S.-Israeli war with Iran, after senior Republican lawmakers warned it could be a “disastrous mistake.” It comes a day after the president said that a potential deal was “largely negotiated.” NBC News’ Raf Sanchez reports.

headlines.title: China controls a metal that’s key for the Iran war, sending the U.S. on a global hunt for more
headlines.description: The United States is burning through weapons stockpiles in Iran, and replacing them will require large amounts of tungsten, a powerful metal whose supply is dominated by China.

headlines.title: California crews race to avoid toxic chemical tank explosion
headlines.description: Crews have been working through the weekend to cool a chemical tank and stop it from exploding in Southern California as they worked to avert a disastrous “worst-case” scenario, the incident’s commander said. NBC News’ Steve Patterson reports.

headlines.title: Reality check: Spencer Pratt seeks to convert online attention to real-life votes in L.A.
headlines.description: The viral, AI-generated video opens with the iconic Hollywood sign on fire and features Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass wearing makeup to look like the Joker.

headlines.title: Pope Leo will take on AI alongside an Anthropic co-founder
headlines.description: Pope Leo XIV is set to release a landmark encyclical Monday focused on preserving human dignity in the face of AI

headlines.title: Secret Service kills man who opened fire at White House security checkpoint
headlines.description: The U.S. Secret Service says officers shot and killed a person who opened fire at a security checkpoint on Saturday. Five senior law enforcement officials say the suspect had a history of mental health concerns. NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin reports.

headlines.title: The 93+ absolute best Memorial Day sales worth shopping
headlines.description: Shop the best Memorial Day deals on mattresses, home appliances, beauty, tech and more from brands like Brooklinen, Ninja, Levoit, EltaMD and Apple.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Jewish Democrats grapple with a changing party and Israel’s entrenched leadership
headlines.description: Onstage and on the sidelines of the recent Jewish Democratic Council of America Leadership Summit in Washington, prominent pro-Israel Democrats tiptoed into one of the biggest debates roiling their party

headlines.title: China controls a metal that’s key for the Iran war, sending the U.S. on a global hunt for more
headlines.description: The United States is burning through weapons stockpiles in Iran, and replacing them will require large amounts of tungsten, a powerful metal whose supply is dominated by China.

headlines.title: Potential crack on California chemical tank may ease pressure as crews race to prevent explosion
headlines.description: A potential crack may be releasing pressure inside a toxic chemical tank in Garden Grove, officials said Sunday, a development they hope could help avert a devastating vapor explosion.

headlines.title: Kimi Antonelli wins fourth Formula 1 race in a row after George Russell’s car issues
headlines.description: Buckle up: The Mercedes intra-team battle for the Formula 1 drivers’ world championship just kicked into high gear
